candidates.why: Swedish label for total current assets; matches ACT exactly.
Only a component of current assets, not total current assets.
Only a component of current assets, not total current assets.
Total assets, not current assets.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist because it is the clear reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line for CHE.
Very close conceptually, but secondary to the explicit cash and cash equivalents label.
Exact total current liabilities line; preferred clean total.
Also appears as a total current liabilities line in some periods/casing variation.

candidates.row_label: Accounts payable - trade and other current liabilities
candidates.why: Large component/subtotal within current liabilities, but not full total current liabilities.
Only one component of current liabilities.

variables.notes: Included both casing variants as a priority list because labels can vary over time.

candidates.why: Best match for short-term debt/current financing liabilities; cleaner than selecting only maturities or overdrafts.
Represents current portion of long-term debt, but may be only a component if a total current interest-bearing debt line exists.
Short-term borrowing, but may be only one component and often captured within current interest-bearing liabilities.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist because it is the clean total short-term interest-bearing debt line. Excluded lease rows per instruction and avoided combining with maturities/overdraft to reduce double counting.

candidates.why: Exact current taxes payable/current tax liabilities line.
Best balance-sheet total for property, plant and equipment under IFRS-style labeling.
Only a component of PPE.
Only a component of PPE.
Exact total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investments
candidates.why: Despite awkward wording, values reconcile as net cash from operating activities after working-capital changes, interest, and tax.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not final operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investments

variables.notes: Selected the reported CFO total line even though the label appears malformed; the values align with net cash flow from operating activities.
